title: rosa canina subsp. pseudotomentosa
intro: Rosa canina subsp. pseudotomentosa, also known as the pseudotomentosa rose or prickly wild rose, is a subspecies of rose that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rosa canina subsp. pseudotomentosa include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and menstrual cramps. Rosa canina subsp. pseudotomentosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice for natural remedies and traditional medicine.
